title: Faulty reward functions in the wild
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms can break in surprising, counterintuitive ways. In this post we’ll explore one failure mode, which is where you misspecify your reward function.
summaryZh: 强化学习算法可能会以令人惊讶、违反直觉的方式破解。在这篇文章中，我们将探讨一种失败模式，即您错误地指定了奖励功能。
highlights: Reinforcement learning algorithms can break in surprising, counterintuitive ways.
In this post we’ll explore one failure mode, which is where you misspecify your reward function.
highlightsZh: 强化学习算法可能会以令人惊讶、违反直觉的方式破解。在这篇文章中，我们将探讨一种失败模式，即您错误地指定了奖励功能。

title: Universe
summary: We’re releasing Universe, a software platform for measuring and training an AI’s general intelligence across the world’s supply of games, websites and other applications.
summaryZh: 我们正在发布Universe ，这是一个软件平台，用于在全球游戏、网站和其他应用程序的供应中测量和训练人工智能的一般智能。
highlights: We’re releasing Universe, a software platform for measuring and training an AI’s general intelligence across the world’s supply of games, websites and other applications.
